criteria.criterion: The project eval override resolves from `.rebar/evals/plan-review-project-portability.eval.yaml`.
The eval spec declares `epochs: 3` plus `gate: at_least(2)`.
The eval spec declares one deterministic `emits_valid_findings` scorer.
The dataset contains exactly `PORT-F1` through `PORT-F4` with `expect: finding`.
The dataset contains exactly `PORT-N1` through `PORT-N4` with `expect: pass`.
Every must-fire case has a non-empty `note` whose four exact labels are followed by non-whitespace text.
The must-not-fire cases respectively cover silence, project configuration, explicit surface scoping, plus portable alternatives.
Every gold entry carries a non-empty `input` plus the expected `label`.
An injected perfect solve returns the exact metric mapping specified in the Approach.
